hidden_gems.name: Plain
hidden_gems.why: Better UX than Zendesk for technical teams.

hidden_gems.name: Activepieces
hidden_gems.why: Cleaner alt to n8n for simple workflows.

hidden_gems.name: Beehiiv
hidden_gems.why: Modern Substack alt with full ownership.

avoid_list.name: Salesforce
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: If your team is <50 reps. Implementation cost > license cost.

avoid_list.name: Datadog
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: If you're under 20 hosts. Cheaper alternatives suffice.

avoid_list.name: Quip
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Only makes sense if deeply in Salesforce.

avoid_list.name: Synthesia
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Avatars look uncanny in close-up. HeyGen's better.

avoid_list.name: LastPass
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Multiple breaches. Switch to 1Password or Bitwarden.

avoid_list.name: Mulesoft
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: $80K+ pricing locks out anyone not enterprise.

avoid_list.name: Workday
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Implementation cost > license. Use Rippling/BambooHR until 1000+ employees.

avoid_list.name: Drift
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Sales-focused chat; SMBs locked out by pricing.

avoid_list.name: Outreach
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Pricing locks out teams under 20 reps.

avoid_list.name: ZoomInfo
avoid_list.when_to_avoid: Heavy enterprise pricing for what Apollo+Clearbit can do.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.verdict: Default for general assistance. Best quality below $30/mo.

tools.name: Claude
tools.verdict: Best for long-context reading, careful analysis, writing.
tools.gotchas: Free tier rate-limits frustrate power users.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.verdict: Strong for Google ecosystem integration; weaker for code.
tools.gotchas: Hallucinates more than peers in benchmarks.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.verdict: Best for research questions needing citations.
tools.gotchas: Less good for pure reasoning vs ChatGPT/Claude.

tools.name: Poe
tools.verdict: Switch between 20+ models in one UI.

tools.name: Anthropic API
tools.verdict: Best for production apps needing high quality + safety.
tools.gotchas: Cost can blow up on long contexts.

tools.name: OpenAI API
tools.verdict: Industry default API; best tooling ecosystem.

tools.name: Replicate
tools.verdict: Run any open-source model on demand.

tools.name: Together AI
tools.gotchas: Less mature than OpenAI API tooling.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.verdict: Aiprosol's pick for production. Reads codebases, writes commits.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.verdict: VS Code fork with deep AI integration. Best multi-line edits.

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.verdict: Cleaner UI than Cursor. Codeium underneath.

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.verdict: Best for autocomplete within existing IDE workflows.
tools.gotchas: Weaker on multi-file edits vs Cursor.

tools.name: Codeium
tools.verdict: Free tier for individuals. Good enough autocomplete.

tools.name: v0 (Vercel)
tools.verdict: Generate React + Tailwind UI from a prompt. Aiprosol uses it.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.gotchas: Discord interface; no API until v6.1.

tools.name: Stable Diffusion 3
tools.verdict: Run locally; full control; open weights.

tools.name: Ideogram
tools.verdict: Best at rendering text inside images (logos, posters).

tools.name: Adobe Firefly
tools.verdict: Commercially safe training data. Strong for brand work.

tools.name: HeyGen
tools.verdict: Faster + cheaper than Synthesia. Real-time avatar streams.

tools.name: Whisper API
tools.verdict: Default for transcription. Aiprosol uses it.
tools.gotchas: Slower than purpose-built services for live.

tools.name: AssemblyAI
tools.gotchas: Pricier than Whisper if you don't need extras.

tools.name: Deepgram
tools.gotchas: Quality slightly below Whisper for non-English.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.verdict: Best if you already use Notion. Cross-page Q&A.

tools.name: Glean
tools.verdict: Enterprise knowledge search across all SaaS.

tools.name: n8n
tools.verdict: Aiprosol's primary. Self-host; no per-task limits.

tools.name: Make.com
tools.verdict: Best visual editor; more powerful than Zapier.

tools.name: Pipedream
tools.verdict: Best when you need code escape hatch.

tools.name: Bardeen
tools.verdict: Run automations in your browser. Good for scraping.

tools.name: HubSpot
tools.verdict: Best free CRM tier. Aiprosol uses it.

tools.name: Pipedrive
tools.verdict: Cleaner UX than HubSpot for small sales teams.

tools.name: Close
tools.verdict: Best for high-velocity inside sales (built-in dialer).

tools.name: Attio
tools.verdict: Modern CRM with relations + custom objects.

tools.name: Folk
tools.verdict: Best for solo founders + early sales teams.

tools.name: Mailchimp
tools.gotchas: Pricing scales poorly with list size.

tools.name: Mixpanel
tools.gotchas: Costs balloon with high event volume.

tools.name: Notion
tools.gotchas: Slower than dedicated tools at scale.

tools.name: Monday.com
tools.verdict: Best visual workflows for non-tech teams.

tools.name: Coda
tools.verdict: Best for ops teams needing doc + DB combo.

tools.name: Plain
tools.verdict: Best UX for technical support teams.

tools.name: Pylon
tools.verdict: Best for managing customer Slack channels.

tools.name: Crisp
tools.verdict: Best free tier for very small teams.
tools.gotchas: Less powerful than peers at scale.

tools.name: Groq
tools.verdict: Aiprosol uses for chat widget. Sub-100ms.

tools.name: Phi-4
tools.verdict: Small enough to run on laptops.

tools.name: Hugging Face Spaces
tools.verdict: Try any open-source model in browser.

tools.name: Forefront AI
tools.verdict: One API for multiple model providers.

tools.name: Cognition Devin
tools.gotchas: Quality below human SWE in benchmarks.

tools.name: Granola
tools.verdict: Macbook native, no bot in calls.

tools.name: Clearbit
tools.gotchas: Acquired by HubSpot; pricing in flux.

tools.name: ConvertKit
tools.gotchas: Less powerful than peers at scale.

tools.name: Netlify
tools.gotchas: Pricier than Vercel for some cases.
